name: @ha-designer/desktop
description: Electron shell for ha-ai-designer. Spawns daemon + web, opens a BrowserWindow.

scripts.package: node scripts/bundle-daemon.mjs && node scripts/bundle-web.mjs && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac: node scripts/bundle-daemon.mjs && node scripts/bundle-web.mjs && electron-builder --mac --publish never
